name: Israel Opportunity - Energy Resources, LP
summary: Israel Opportunity - Energy Resources, LP engages in the exploration, development, and production of oil and gas properties. It holds a portfolio of participating rights in various offshore and onshore oil assets in Israel and North America. Israel Opportunity √Ç¬ñ Oil and Gas Exploration Ltd. serves as a general partner of the company. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Ramat Gan, Israel.
